pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 17 creates the watermark at this exact path using ImageMagick convert command: 'convert -size 200x50 xc:none -fill "rgba(128,128,128,0.5)" -gravity Center -pointsize 24 -annotate 0 "COPYRIGHT" /home/ga/Documents/watermark.png'

Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 86 states 'Opacity: 20', and verifier.py line 32 defaults to expected_opacity='20'. Configuration paths checked: design/watermark/image_imageOpacity, design/watermark/small_image_imageOpacity, design/watermark/thumbnail_imageOpacity

Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 87 states 'Position: Center', and verifier.py line 33 defaults to expected_position='center'. Note: verifier.py lines 95-96 comment mentions position might be stored as 'center' or '1' depending on Magento version, but 'UI usually sends center'. Web search confirms 'center' is a valid Magento watermark position option.

Code analysis: export_result.sh line 16 defines SCOPES_TO_CHECK='websites'. Web search and Magento documentation confirm 'websites' is the correct scope name for website-level configuration (per Adobe Experience League documentation on Magento scopes).

Code analysis: export_result.sh line 17 defines SCOPE_IDS_TO_CHECK='1'. Web search and Magento documentation confirm that scope_id 1 represents the default 'Main Website' in a standard Magento 2 installation (per Adobe Experience League documentation on website hierarchy).

privileged_info_summary: The task configures automatic product image watermarking for the Main Website (scope_id=1) in Magento. A synthetic PNG watermark is generated during setup at /home/ga/Documents/watermark.png using ImageMagick, featuring semi-transparent gray text reading 'COPYRIGHT'. The task requires uploading this watermark for Base, Small, and Thumbnail image types with opacity set to 20% and position set to 'center'. Configuration is applied at the website scope ('websites') with scope_id 1, which corresponds to the Main Website in standard Magento 2 installations. The verifier checks for correct configuration in the core_config_data database table under paths design/watermark/[image_type]_[image/imageOpacity/position].
